Records.authors: Bargiela, Piotr, Frellesvig, Hjalte, Marzucca, Robin, Morales, Roger, Seefeld, Florian, Wilhelm, Matthias, Yang, Tong-Zhi
Records.description: $I^{*}_{3,2,2}$ two-loop topology with three internal paths of lengths a=3, b=2, c=2 (only one of v_L/v_R carries external legs); 5-point integral, non-planar (b=>=2). Geometry: 2 ISPs; non-planar double box family; genus-3 hyperelliptic curve (§4 non-planar DB)
Records.location: §3.4 'Integrals with two ISPs' + §4 non-planar DB I_{3,2,2}, I*_{3,2,2}
